name: com.baran.apple-foundation-models
description: Unity plugin for Apple Foundation Models on-device text generation, streaming, structured output, and availability checks on iOS 26+, with a deterministic Editor mock for development. Native macOS support is planned for a future release.

samples.description: Checks whether Apple Foundation Models are available on the current device.
Streaming text output into a chat UI.
Generate structured JSON and parse it into C# data.
Run repeatable local or device validation checks and copy a privacy-safe report.
